3222070.name: MGDC Minigame Collection
3222070.description:
The MGDC Minigame Collection is what it says on the tin - A collection of our club's previous minigames and small projects for you to enjoy. The Collection includes 19 separate titles, ranging from simulators, racing games, shooters, and more. Each game was crafted in a limited time frame by students in the Miami University Game Design club, working on enhancing the skills of members, and having fun while doing it.

Collection Titles


  • Gorg Story
  • Ohio Simulator
  • Cupid Sim
  • Miami Guys
  • Crawformon
  • Astra Eternum
  • Jungle Tanks
  • Kardboard Kombat
  • Halloween Minigames
  • Turkey Hunting
  • Redhawk Dash
  • Clown Punching
  • Circus Shootout
  • Mini Golf
  • Crab Racing
  • Miami Balancing

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
